title: Tuya Device
description: Represents an IoT device registered to a Tuya cloud project, including its attributes, current status, and association with a user and product.

id.description: Unique device identifier assigned by Tuya

name.description: Friendly display name for the device

local_key.description: Local encryption key for direct LAN communication

category.description: Device product category code (e.g., dj=smart bulb, kg=switch)

product_id.description: Product ID in the Tuya product catalog

sub.description: Whether this device is a sub-device connected via a gateway

owner_id.description: Identifier of the home or asset that owns this device

online.description: Whether the device is currently online and reachable

status.description: Current values of all device data points

code.description: Data point identifier code (e.g., switch_led, bright_value)

value.description: Current value of the data point, type varies by code

active_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of when the device was first activated

create_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of device record creation

update_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of last device update

time_zone.description: Time zone of the device location (IANA format)

ip.description: IP address of the device when last online
